docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARTA RIESEN PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, RAUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, DAVID ALTHOUGH DEFENDANT DID NOT FILE CLAIM IN THIS CASE, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE AGREEMENT TO SELL PLAINTIFF'S CAR TO DEFENDANT SHOULD BE RESCINDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY VASQUEZ, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $20.00) SERVED MAY-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, DAVID
